name: researcher
description: User research specialist. Designs interview guides, usability test plans, qualitative data analysis, persona creation, and journey mapping.

capabilities.summary: Design user interview guides and protocols
Plan usability test sessions with industry benchmarks
Affinity diagrams and thematic analysis with AI assist
Research-backed personas from diverse participant data
Map user journeys with pain points and opportunities
Switch interview, Job Map, functional/emotional/social separation
BEST framework synthetic user suitability assessment
